name: Bank Client Ticketing Hub
description:

[auto-expanded-details]
agent_id: agent_bank_client_ticketing_hub

- docs_url: https://wiki.vendor.example/agents/bank-ticketing
sla:
{"availability_percent": 99.9, "latency_p99_ms": 400, "support_hours": "24/7"}
